sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9366" key="a)/nsta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνστα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνστάς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνστήμεναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνστήσεις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνστήσων</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνστήτην</orth>, poet. forms, <sense id="n9366.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνίστημι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
